kbSpec.behavior: Moves focus to the Legend items, focusing the first legend item. If legend is not available, moves focus to the next focusable element on the page.
Moves focus to the previous focusable element on the page.
Based on the chart type, the arrow keys move through points or series.
Triggers the click action for the series point or legend item.
Closes the series tooltip if it was open. A second press will move the focus to the root element of the chart.
Move through the different series. Stacked Bar/Column and Line/Area charts move focus to next/previous series item based on coordinates. Regular Bar charts move focus according to datasource order.
Move through the points in the series.
Move to the outer series.
Move to inner series.
Move through the points of the series in a clockwise direction.
Move through the points of the series in an anti-clockwise direction.
Move through the series in datasource order.
Move through items in the current series.
Move through the items in the chart.
Move in a clockwise/anti-clockwise manner through series.
Move to next/previous series point based on value — Up moves away from center, Down moves towards center.
Move through the points of the series in a clockwise direction.
Move through the points of the series in an anti-clockwise direction.
Move focus to the next focusable element on the page.
Move focus to the chart area, focusing the first point in the first series.
Move focus to the previous legend item. Cycles to the last item at the beginning.
Move focus to the next legend item. Cycles to the first item at the end.
Toggles the series visibility similar to the click action.
Moves the focus to the root element of the chart.
